chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. B–07 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.3505/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.3506/2025. 18.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Baqar Raza, Advocate for the plaintiff a/w plaintiff’s attorney namely Asif Raza son of Liaqat Ali and Imtiaz Ahmed Butt son of Mukhtar Ahmed Butt. The CEO of the defendant namely Ghulam Farooq son of Muhammad Siddique Gallani present in person. ------------------------------------------ 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Through this joint application under Order XXIII Rule 3 r/w Section 151 CPC, the parties seek consent / compromise decree on the ground that vide letter dated 26.08.2025 the defendant approached the plaintiff for settlement of liabilities and vide letter of agreement dated 29.08.2025 finally the parties have agreed to compromise on the terms and conditions as set out in the application and they prayed that the present Suit be decreed in terms thereof. The application is supported by the affidavits of authorized representatives / attorneys of the plaintiff-bank and the CEO of defendant- company. The above named authorized attorneys / representatives of the plaintiff and the CEO of the defendant are present in Court. They reiterate the contents of the application and state that they have signed the application with their own free will and without any coercion and oppression. They request that the Suit be decreed on the terms and conditions as set out in the instant application. Accordingly, the application is allowed as prayed subject to all legal consequences and resultantly the Suit stands decreed in terms thereof.

They request that the Suit be decreed on the terms and conditions as set out in the instant application. Accordingly, the application is allowed as prayed subject to all legal consequences and resultantly the Suit stands decreed in terms thereof. Office is directed to prepare the decree. v s s s J U D G E Asif
